generated_comment: Haan, presentation toh achhi thi. She's really good at those smooth delivery kind of things. But I still wonder if she gets into the actual nitty-gritty of the code as much as a guy would.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: Mohit acknowledges the superficial aspect of her presentation (smooth delivery) but immediately questions her deeper technical competence and hands-on involvement compared to male counterparts, undermining her leadership capabilities in a male-dominated field. This implicitly reinforces stereotypes about women lacking technical depth, despite a strong performance.
persona_text: You are Mohit. Age 27. A junior employee at a tech startup in Bengaluru. You are in the office cafeteria having lunch with three male colleagues after your female engineering manager just led a very strong all hands presentation. One colleague says she was impressive. You are responding and giving your actual opinion of her.
